prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023年最低位次约15335名，2024年后移至17125名（后移约1790名），2025年回升至16640名（前移约485名），近三年整体呈后移趋势，2025年基准约16640名。 该校在新疆理科招生计划2023年23人、2024年24人、2025年24人，2026年骤降至15人，较2025年缩招37.5%，大幅缩减的招生计划将显著降低竞争门 槛。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年波动较大，2021年第180名、2022年第182名、2024年第173名、2025年第198名，整体处于全国第170-200 名区间，排名近年略有下滑；该校未出现在学校声誉事件统计中，无显著正面或负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第106位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光度较低；无投档断档或录取异常记录，整体报考关注度平稳。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校招生专业涉及临床医学（社会热度推荐）、计算机类（高热推荐）、金融学（分化观望）等；新疆2025年理科考生约52538人，2026年总考生约238000人（不确定标记）， 按2025年理科占比68.6%估算2026年理科考生约163268人，较2025年大幅增长约210%，竞争显著加剧；青海大学位于青海 省，与新疆相邻，属西北地区高校，对新疆考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在新疆招生占比较小，2026年计划仅15人。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次16640名、2026年招生 计划大幅缩招37.5%（降低竞争门槛）、新疆理科考生数预计大幅增长约210%（加剧竞争）等多重因素，缩招与考生大增方向相反，但考生增幅远超缩招幅度，预计竞争整体略有 加剧；预测最低位次约13096名，区间12596-13596名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 15335, shifting to 17125 in 2024 (a backward shift of about 1790 places), and recovering to 16640 in 2025 (a forward shift of about 485 places). Overall, the past three years show a backward trend, with a baseline of about 16640 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for Science in Xinjiang was 23 in 2023, 24 in 2024, 24 in 2025, and sharply drops to 15 in 2026, a 37.5% reduction compared to 2025. This significant reduction in enrollment plan will notably lower the competition threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has fluctuated in recent years: 180th in 2021, 182nd in 2022, 173rd in 2024, and 198th in 2025, overall in the 170-200 range nationally, with a slight decline in recent years. The university does not appear in the statistics of school reputation incidents, with no significant positive or negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranks 106th overall, rated as 'average', with low exposure on short video platforms. There are no records of enrollment gaps or admission anomalies, and overall application attention is stable.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's enrollment majors include Clinical Medicine (socially recommended), Computer Science (highly recommended), Finance (divergent wait-and-see), etc. The number of Science examinees in Xinjiang in 2025 is about 52538, and the total examinees in 2026 is about 238000 (uncertain mark). Based on the 2025 Science proportion of 68.6%, the estimated number of Science examinees in 2026 is about 163268, a significant increase of about 210% compared to 2025, intensifying competition. Qinghai University is located in Qinghai Province, adjacent to Xinjiang, and as a university in the Northwest region, it has some regional appeal to Xinjiang examinees. The university's enrollment proportion in Xinjiang is small, with only 15 places planned for 2026.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the baseline ranking of 16640 in 2025, the significant reduction of 37.5% in the 2026 enrollment plan (lowering the competition threshold), and the expected substantial increase of about 210% in the number of Science examinees in Xinjiang (intensifying competition), the reduction in enrollment and the surge in examinees are in opposite directions, but the increase in examinees far exceeds the reduction in enrollment, so overall competition is expected to slightly intensify. The predicted minimum ranking is about 13096, with a range of 12596-13596.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 12596-13596, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, appropriately aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 12500), you can focus on sprinting for popular majors like Clinical Medicine and Computer Science and Technology. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (outside 13500), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 2 and Tier 3 majors to increase the probability of admission.
